summarization.a: The chart plots the experimental growth rate in nanometers per cycle against the precursor pulsing time, illustrating the saturation of the ALD process.

a.question: When does the curve reach a plateau?
What would be the optimal pulse time for the fastest manufacturing?
a.answer: The optimal pulse time for the fastest manufacturing would be 2 seconds.

a.question: Is higher uniformity across the sample achieved at lower or higher pulsing times?
a.answer: Based on the error bars, higher uniformity is achieved at higher pulsing times.
